## Type

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] i18n — translations / locale
- [ ] docs / chore / refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] No secrets, model weights, or user content committed
- [ ] UI changes tested in at least one LTR and one RTL locale (if applicable)
- [ ] Updated docs / `.env.example` if config changed
